S.FORM: Jonathan Bender sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1981, ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 1, Jonathan Bender, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *onatńßan ő≤en*er s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, *onatńßan ő≤en*er, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
